hub.name: ShipVault

all_access_pass.license_system: supabase project ecgovzhaxxjwfozhacin, table all_access_licenses, RPCs check_license/get_license_by_session

hub.note: Rebuilt per landing-page audit: single primary CTA, proof strip, personas, statically pre-rendered app grid, dedicated SEO page per live app, sitemap.xml/robots.txt, JSON-LD. Future days should add a matching /apps/<slug>.html page using apps/hub/apps/_template.html and a screenshot at apps/hub/assets/<slug>.png, then run apps/hub/bake.py before deploy.

apps.name: StreakForge
apps.idea: Habit streak tracker with visual calendar

apps.idea: Simple invoice generator with PDF export

apps.name: QRStudio
apps.idea: Custom styled QR code generator

apps.name: MeetingMeter
apps.idea: Live meeting cost calculator by attendee salary

apps.name: SubTrackr
apps.idea: Track every subscription you pay for in one place (no bank linking) and get a reminder before each one renews

apps.name: WarrantyBox
apps.idea: Snap a photo of any receipt and get an automatic reminder before that item's warranty expires

apps.name: CarCareLog
apps.idea: Track oil changes, tire rotations, and other car maintenance by mileage, with reminders before you're due
apps.pro_feature: Unlimited cars + full service history export

apps.name: HomeSeasons
apps.idea: A simple seasonal home-maintenance calendar (gutters, HVAC filters, smoke detectors) with reminders so nothing gets missed

apps.name: IOUeasy
apps.idea: The simplest way to track who owes who between friends and family - no bank linking, no login required for the other person

apps.name: PackList
apps.idea: An auto-generated packing list based on your destination, trip length, and the weather forecast

apps.name: PlantParent
apps.idea: Never forget to water your houseplants again - one simple reminder per plant, timed to its type

apps.name: VetReminder
apps.idea: Track your pet's vaccines and vet visits with automatic reminders before they're due

apps.name: RecipeBox
apps.idea: Save your family's recipes in one private, searchable place - no ads, no auto-playing videos

apps.name: DebtSnowball
apps.idea: See exactly which credit card or loan to pay off first, and watch your payoff date move up as you pay

apps.name: PillPal
apps.idea: A simple daily medication reminder and tracker for yourself or a loved one you're caring for

apps.name: GiftBrain
apps.idea: Remember what you got everyone last year so you never repeat a gift, with birthday/anniversary reminders built in

apps.name: MoveChecklist
apps.idea: Everyone you need to notify when you move (banks, subscriptions, mail) checked off one by one
apps.pro_feature: Unlimited saved moves + automatic reminder emails

apps.name: DeclutterCash
apps.idea: Turn your garage-sale pile into a priced inventory in minutes, so nothing gets sold for less than it's worth

apps.name: HomeInventory
apps.idea: Photograph and catalog your belongings in 10 minutes so you have proof of what you own if you ever need to file a claim
apps.pro_feature: Unlimited items + PDF report for your insurer

apps.name: CouponKeeper
apps.idea: Every coupon and promo code you're saving, in one place, sorted by expiration date so none go to waste

apps.name: EmergencyBinder
apps.idea: One private place with everything your family would need to find in an emergency - insurance, passwords, your wishes
apps.pro_feature: Unlimited entries + secure share with one trusted person

apps.name: PaycheckPlanner
apps.idea: Split your paycheck into simple spending buckets the moment it hits your account - built for living paycheck to paycheck

apps.name: KidsChoreChart
apps.idea: A simple chore chart and allowance tracker your kids can check off themselves

apps.name: BabyBook
apps.idea: A private photo timeline of your baby's milestones - first smile, first steps - without posting anything to social media

apps.name: WatchListPlus
apps.idea: Every movie and show you want to watch, in one list, with a random picker for when you and your partner can't decide

apps.name: WeddingBudgetJar

apps.name: FridgeMeals
apps.idea: Tell it what's in your fridge and get five simple dinner ideas you can actually make tonight

apps.name: TripBudget
apps.idea: Track your vacation spending against a budget in real time, in whatever currency you're in

apps.name: BirthdayCards
apps.idea: Never forget a birthday card again - get a reminder a week ahead, plus a heartfelt message written for you

apps.name: BorrowTrack
apps.idea: Keep track of what you've lent to friends and neighbors - tools, books, kitchen gadgets - so you actually get it back
